title: Front Office Manager - Scootsy Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Scootsy Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Scootsy Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Scootsy Holdings Services:
Scootsy Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
